objectives: Implement complete SWIFT MT message parser in mx20022-translate crate
Cover block-level parsing and field parsers for MT103, MT202, MT940
Pass all quality gates: check, test, clippy -D warnings, fmt --check
constraints: No regex for block extraction — use brace-depth scanning
Regex only for field tag detection in block 4
important_facts: regex = '1' was already in workspace Cargo.toml, only needed regex.workspace = true in translate crate
parse_block4 returns Block4 directly (not Result) — clippy unnecessary_wraps caught this
HashMap::get requires &u8 reference, not integer literal — caught on first compile
All .gitkeep files removed from src/mt/, src/mt/fields/, src/mappings/, testdata/mt/
MT940 :61: field parsing: entry date detection uses lookahead for D/C/R char at pos+4
Block 4 continuation lines appended with '\n' to previous field value
Block 3 and 5 use brace-depth counting for nested {tag:value} pairs
decisions_made: parse_block4 returns Block4 not Result<Block4>: the function never fails, clippy flagged unnecessary_wraps
Amount stored as decimal string with '.' separator, not f64: avoids floating-point precision issues
Year 2-digit cutoff at 80: yy>=80 -> 19xx, yy<80 -> 20xx, matching SWIFT convention
find_standalone_86 uses consumption count heuristic: :86: fields beyond consumed_count are standalone
Block2Input priority parsed with filter(matches!) — delivery_monitoring only if priority present
artifacts: crates/mx20022-translate/src/lib.rs — added pub mod mt; pub mod mappings;
risks_issues: MT940 :61: field is complex positional format — entry date detection is heuristic: resolved
SWIFT 2-digit year ambiguity (cutoff 80) — documented in code: resolved

iteration.summary: Implemented the complete SWIFT MT block-level parser using brace-depth scanning and field parsers for MT103, MT202, and MT940. Created 17 files (modified 2, created 15), removed 4 .gitkeep files. The parser correctly handles multi-line fields, nested block structures (blocks 3 and 5), and the complex :61: statement line format in MT940. All 83 tests pass (40 unit, 39 integration, 4 doctests) and all four quality gates are green.
next_actions: MT<->MX translation framework (task #13): implement mappings/ module with MT103->pacs.008, MT202->pacs.009, MT940->camt.053 field mappings
